reasoning: Initial observation suggests a relationship between voltage, current, and resistance. To confirm the relationship, I will increase the current and observe the effect on voltage.
Increasing the current resulted in a proportional increase in voltage. This supports Ohm's Law, V = IR. I will now decrease the current to confirm the relationship.
The relationship holds true when decreasing the current as well, confirming Ohm's Law (V = IR). No further action is needed to deduce the equation.
